fields.acceptance_criteria: Implement a reproducible Docker harness that runs documented install and deinstall flows and verifies installed tools work.
fields.title: Implement Docker harness for documented install and deinstall flows
fields.validation_plan: Run the harness from a clean Docker environment at least twice and confirm stable pass/fail output and cleanup behavior.

fields.acceptance_criteria: Implement a reproducible Docker harness plus synchronized .spec contract entries and README generation rules for documented install and deinstall flows.
fields.title: Implement Docker harness for documented install and deinstall flows
fields.validation_plan: Run the Docker harness, validate the install-related .spec entries, and confirm the generated README install section stays aligned with the same canonical contract.
